steps.title: Apply the reciprocal relationship from the given condition
steps.content: From $\tfrac{x}{9}=5$, take the reciprocal of both sides to get $\tfrac{9}{x}=\tfrac{1}{5}$.

steps.title: Compute the target value
steps.content: So $\tfrac{9}{x} = \tfrac{1}{5}$. That matches choice B — B is correct.
